bank_network_id.description: ID debit network uses to identify a bank

bin_id.description: The ID of the bank's BIN that uses this debit network

creation_time.description: The timestamp representing when BIN network mapping was created

end_date.description: The time when mapping becomes inactive

last_modified_time.description: The timestamp representing when the BIN network mapping was last modified

network_id.description: The ID of the debit_network associated with the BIN of the bank

start_date.description: The time when mapping becomes active
